info.description:
Needs description.

item.name: Atlassian Get Issue Type Screen Scheme Items

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.
The list of issue type screen scheme IDs. To include multiple issue type screen schemes, separate IDs with ampersand: `issueTypeScreenSchemeId=10000&issueTypeScreenSchemeId=10001`.
The list of issue type screen scheme IDs. To include multiple issue type screen schemes, separate IDs with ampersand: `issueTypeScreenSchemeId=10000&issueTypeScreenSchemeId=10001`.

request.description:
Returns a [paginated](#pagination) list of issue type screen scheme items.

Only issue type screen schemes used in classic projects are returned.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.
The list of issue type screen scheme IDs. To include multiple issue type screen schemes, separate IDs with ampersand: `issueTypeScreenSchemeId=10000&issueTypeScreenSchemeId=10001`.

response.name: Returned if the request is not valid.

item.name: Atlassian Get Issue Type Screen Schemes For Projects

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.
(Required) The list of project IDs. To include multiple projects, separate IDs with ampersand: `projectId=10000&projectId=10001`.
(Required) The list of project IDs. To include multiple projects, separate IDs with ampersand: `projectId=10000&projectId=10001`.

request.description:
Returns a [paginated](#pagination) list of issue type screen schemes and, for each issue type screen scheme, a list of the projects that use it.

Only issue type screen schemes used in classic projects are returned.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.
(Required) The list of project IDs. To include multiple projects, separate IDs with ampersand: `projectId=10000&projectId=10001`.

response.name: Returned if the request is not valid.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.
(Required) The list of project IDs. To include multiple projects, separate IDs with ampersand: `projectId=10000&projectId=10001`.

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.
(Required) The list of project IDs. To include multiple projects, separate IDs with ampersand: `projectId=10000&projectId=10001`.

response.name: Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.

item.name: Atlassian Assign Issue Type Screen Scheme To Project

request.description:
Assigns an issue type screen scheme to a project.

Issue type screen schemes can only be assigned to classic projects.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

Returned if:

 *  project is not found.
 *  issue type screen scheme is not found.
 *  the project is not a classic project.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.
Returned if the issue type screen scheme or the project are missing.

item.name: Atlassian Update Issue Type Screen Scheme Default Screen Scheme

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.

request.description:
Updates the default screen scheme of an issue type screen scheme. The default screen scheme is used for all unmapped issue types.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.
Returned if the issue type screen scheme or the screen scheme is not found, or the screen scheme isn't used in classic projects.

item.name: Atlassian Remove Mappings From Issue Type Screen Scheme

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.

request.description:
Removes issue type to screen scheme mappings from an issue type screen scheme.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the screen scheme mappings are removed from the issue type screen scheme.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.
Returned if the issue type screen scheme or one or more issue type mappings are not found.

item.name: Atlassian Append Mappings To Issue Type Screen Scheme

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.

request.description:
Appends issue type to screen scheme mappings to an issue type screen scheme.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.
Returned if the issue type screen scheme, issue type, or screen scheme is not found.
Returned if the issue type is a sub-task, but sub-tasks are disabled in Jira settings.

item.name: Atlassian Get Issue Type Screen Scheme Projects

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.

request.description:
Returns a [paginated](#pagination) list of projects associated with an issue type screen scheme.

Only company-managed projects associated with an issue type screen scheme are returned.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

response.name: Returned if the request is not valid.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

response.name: Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.

query.description: The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

item.name: Atlassian Delete Issue Type Screen Scheme

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.

request.description:
Deletes an issue type screen scheme.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the issue type screen scheme is deleted.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.
Returned if the issue type screen scheme is not found.

item.name: Atlassian Update Issue Type Screen Scheme

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.

request.description:
Updates an issue type screen scheme.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg).

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is not valid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user does not have the required permissions.
Returned if the issue type screen scheme is not found.
